verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi David.   Benedic, anima mea, Domino :  Domine Deus meus, magnificatus es vehementer.  Confessionem et decorem induisti,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרְכִ֥י נַפְשִׁ֗י אֶת־יְ֫הֹוָ֥ה יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהַי גָּדַ֣לְתָּ מְּאֹ֑ד ה֖וֹד וְהָדָ֣ר לָבָֽשְׁתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For David himself. Bless the Lord, O my soul: O Lord my God, thou art exceedingly great. Thou hast put on praise and beauty:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitä Herraa, sieluni! Herra, minun Jumalani, sinä olet sangen suuresti kunnioitettu, suurella kunnialla ja kaunistuksella olet sinä puetettu.
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, O my soul. O Lord my God, thou art very great; thou art clothed with honour and majesty.

verses.latin_vulgate: amictus lumine sicut vestimento.  Extendens cælum sicut pellem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹֽטֶה־א֭וֹר כַּשַּׂלְמָ֑ה נוֹטֶ֥ה שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם כַּיְרִיעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And art clothed with light as with a garment. Who stretchest out the heaven like a pavilion:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä puetat itses valkeudella niinkuin vaatteella: sinä levität taivaat niinkuin peitteen.
verses.king_james: Who coverest thyself with light as with a garment: who stretchest out the heavens like a curtain:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui tegis aquis superiora ejus :  qui ponis nubem ascensum tuum ;  qui ambulas super pennas ventorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥מְקָרֶ֥ה בַמַּ֗יִם עֲֽלִיּ֫וֹתָ֥יו הַשָּׂם־עָבִ֥ים רְכוּב֑וֹ הַֽ֝מְהַלֵּ֗ךְ עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רֽוּחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who coverest the higher rooms thereof with water. Who makest the clouds thy chariot: who walkest upon the wings of the winds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä peität sen päällyksen vedellä: sinä menet pilvissä niinkuin ratasten päällä, ja käyt tuulen siipein päällä.
verses.king_james: Who layeth the beams of his chambers in the waters: who maketh the clouds his chariot: who walketh upon the wings of the wind:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui facis angelos tuos spiritus,  et ministros tuos ignem urentem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹשֶׂ֣ה מַלְאָכָ֣יו רוּח֑וֹת מְ֝שָׁרְתָ֗יו אֵ֣שׁ לֹהֵֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who makest thy angels spirits: and thy ministers a burning fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä teet enkelis hengeksi ja palvelias liekitseväiseksi tuleksi.
verses.king_james: Who maketh his angels spirits; his ministers a flaming fire:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui fundasti terram super stabilitatem suam :  non inclinabitur in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָֽסַד־אֶ֭רֶץ עַל־מְכוֹנֶ֑יהָ בַּל־תִּ֝מּ֗וֹט עוֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who hast founded the earth upon its own bases: it shall not be moved for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä joka maan perustit perustuksensa päälle, ettei sen pidä liikkuman ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Who laid the foundations of the earth, that it should not be removed for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abyssus sicut vestimentum amictus ejus ;  super montes stabunt aquæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּ֭הוֹם כַּלְּב֣וּשׁ כִּסִּית֑וֹ עַל־הָ֝רִ֗ים יַ֖עַמְדוּ־מָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The deep like a garment is its clothing: above the mountains shall the waters stand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Syvyydellä sinä sen peität niinkuin vaatteella, ja vedet seisovat vuorilla.
verses.king_james: Thou coveredst it with the deep as with a garment: the waters stood above the mountains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ab increpatione tua fugient ;  a voce tonitrui tui formidabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־גַּעֲרָ֣תְךָ֣ יְנוּס֑וּן מִן־ק֥וֹל רַ֝עַמְךָ֗ יֵחָפֵזֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: At thy rebuke they shall flee: at the voice of thy thunder they shall fear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinun nuhtelemisestas he pakenevat: sinun jylinästäs he menevät pois.
verses.king_james: At thy rebuke they fled; at the voice of thy thunder they hasted away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendunt montes, et descendunt campi,  in locum quem fundasti eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַעֲל֣וּ הָ֭רִים יֵרְד֣וּ בְקָע֑וֹת אֶל־מְ֝ק֗וֹם זֶ֤ה ׀ יָסַ֬דְתָּ לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The mountains ascend, and the plains descend into the place which thou hast founded for them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vuoret astuvat ylös, ja laaksot astuvat alas siallensa, johon heidät perustanut olet.
verses.king_james: They go up by the mountains; they go down by the valleys unto the place which thou hast founded for them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Terminum posuisti quem non transgredientur,  neque convertentur operire terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גְּֽבוּל־שַׂ֭מְתָּ בַּל־יַעֲבֹר֑וּן בַּל־יְ֝שֻׁב֗וּן לְכַסּ֥וֹת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast set a bound which they shall not pass over; neither shall they return to cover the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Määrän sinä panit, jota ei he käy ylitse, eikä palaja maata peittämään.
verses.king_james: Thou hast set a bound that they may not pass over; that they turn not again to cover the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui emittis fontes in convallibus ;  inter medium montium pertransibunt aquæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽמְשַׁלֵּ֣חַ מַ֭עְיָנִים בַּנְּחָלִ֑ים בֵּ֥ין הָ֝רִ֗ים יְהַלֵּכֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou sendest forth springs in the vales: between the midst of the hills the waters shall pass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä annat lähteet laaksoissa kuohua, niin että ne vuorten välitse vuotavat;
verses.king_james: He sendeth the springs into the valleys, which run among the hills.

verses.latin_vulgate: Potabunt omnes bestiæ agri ;  expectabunt onagri in siti sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֭שְׁקוּ כׇּל־חַיְת֣וֹ שָׂדָ֑י יִשְׁבְּר֖וּ פְרָאִ֣ים צְמָאָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the beasts of the field shall drink: the wild asses shall expect in their thirst.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että kaikki eläimet metsässä joisivat, ja että pedot janonsa sammuttaisivat.
verses.king_james: They give drink to every beast of the field: the wild asses quench their thirst.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super ea volucres cæli habitabunt ;  de medio petrarum dabunt voces.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲ֭לֵיהֶם עוֹף־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם יִשְׁכּ֑וֹן מִבֵּ֥ין עֳ֝פָאיִ֗ם יִתְּנוּ־קֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Over them the birds of the air shall dwell: from the midst of the rocks they shall give forth their voices.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän tykönänsä istuvat taivaan linnut, ja visertävät oksilla.
verses.king_james: By them shall the fowls of the heaven have their habitation, which sing among the branches.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rigans montes de superioribus suis ;  de fructu operum tuorum satiabitur terra :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשְׁקֶ֣ה הָ֭רִים מֵעֲלִיּוֹתָ֑יו מִפְּרִ֥י מַ֝עֲשֶׂ֗יךָ תִּשְׂבַּ֥ע הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou waterest the hills from thy upper rooms: the earth shall be filled with the fruit of thy works:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä liotat vuoret ylhäältä: sinä täytät maan hedelmällä, jonka sinä saatat.
verses.king_james: He watereth the hills from his chambers: the earth is satisfied with the fruit of thy works.

verses.latin_vulgate: producens fœnum jumentis,  et herbam servituti hominum,  ut educas panem de terra,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַצְמִ֤יחַ חָצִ֨יר ׀ לַבְּהֵמָ֗ה וְ֭עֵשֶׂב לַעֲבֹדַ֣ת הָאָדָ֑ם לְה֥וֹצִיא לֶ֝֗חֶם מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Bringing forth grass for cattle, and herb for the service of men. That thou mayst bring bread out of the earth:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä kasvatat ruohon karjalle, ja jyvät ihmisten tarpeeksi, tuottaakses leipää maasta.
verses.king_james: He causeth the grass to grow for the cattle, and herb for the service of man: that he may bring forth food out of the earth;

verses.latin_vulgate: et vinum lætificet cor hominis :  ut exhilaret faciem in oleo,  et panis cor hominis confirmet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיַ֤יִן ׀ יְשַׂמַּ֬ח לְֽבַב־אֱנ֗וֹשׁ לְהַצְהִ֣יל פָּנִ֣ים מִשָּׁ֑מֶן וְ֝לֶ֗חֶם לְֽבַב־אֱנ֥וֹשׁ יִסְעָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that wine may cheer the heart of man. That he may make the face cheerful with oil: and that bread may strengthen man's heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja että viina ihmisen sydämen ilahuttaa, ja hänen kasvonsa kaunistuu öljystä: ja leipä vahvistaa ihmisen sydämen.
verses.king_james: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, and oil to make his face to shine, and bread which strengtheneth man’s heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Saturabuntur ligna campi,  et cedri Libani quas plantavit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭שְׂבְּעוּ עֲצֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה אַֽרְזֵ֥י לְ֝בָנ֗וֹן אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָטָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: The trees of the field shall be filled, and the cedars of Libanus which he hath planted:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että Herran puut nesteestä täynnä olisivat: Libanonin sedripuut, jotka hän on istuttanut;
verses.king_james: The trees of the Lord are full of sap; the cedars of Lebanon, which he hath planted;

verses.latin_vulgate: illic passeres nidificabunt :  herodii domus dux est eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֭ם צִפֳּרִ֣ים יְקַנֵּ֑נוּ חֲ֝סִידָ֗ה בְּרוֹשִׁ֥ים בֵּיתָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: There the sparrows shall make their nests. The highest of them is the house of the heron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä linnut pesiä tekevät, ja haikarat hongissa asuvat.
verses.king_james: Where the birds make their nests: as for the stork, the fir trees are her house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Montes excelsi cervis ;  petra refugium herinaciis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִ֣ים הַ֭גְּבֹהִים לַיְּעֵלִ֑ים סְ֝לָעִ֗ים מַחְסֶ֥ה לַֽשְׁפַנִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The high hills are a refuge for the harts, the rock for the irchins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Korkiat vuoret ovat metsävuohten turva, ja kivirauniot kaninein.
verses.king_james: The high hills are a refuge for the wild goats; and the rocks for the conies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit lunam in tempora ;  sol cognovit occasum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָשָׂ֣ה יָ֭רֵחַ לְמוֹעֲדִ֑ים שֶׁ֝֗מֶשׁ יָדַ֥ע מְבוֹאֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath made the moon for seasons: the sun knoweth his going down.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä teet kuun aikoja jakamaan, ja aurinko tietää laskemisensa.
verses.king_james: He appointed the moon for seasons: the sun knoweth his going down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuisti tenebras, et facta est nox ;  in ipsa pertransibunt omnes bestiæ silvæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּֽשֶׁת־חֹ֭שֶׁךְ וִ֣יהִי לָ֑יְלָה בּוֹ־תִ֝רְמֹ֗שׂ כׇּל־חַיְתוֹ־יָֽעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast appointed darkness, and it is night: in it shall all the beasts of the woods go about:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä teet pimeyden ja yö tulee: silloin kaikki metsän eläimet tulevat ulos.
verses.king_james: Thou makest darkness, and it is night: wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.

verses.latin_vulgate: catuli leonum rugientes ut rapiant,  et quærant a Deo escam sibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭כְּפִירִים שֹׁאֲגִ֣ים לַטָּ֑רֶף וּלְבַקֵּ֖שׁ מֵאֵ֣ל אׇכְלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The young lions roaring after their prey, and seeking their meat from God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nuoret jalopeurat saaliin perään kiljuvat, ja elatustansa Jumalalta etsivät.
verses.king_james: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their meat from God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ortus est sol, et congregati sunt,  et in cubilibus suis collocabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תִּזְרַ֣ח הַ֭שֶּׁמֶשׁ יֵאָסֵפ֑וּן וְאֶל־מְ֝עוֹנֹתָ֗ם יִרְבָּצֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sun ariseth, and they are gathered together: and they shall lie down in their dens.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuin aurinko koittaa, niin he kokoontuvat, ja luolissansa makaavat.
verses.king_james: The sun ariseth, they gather themselves together, and lay them down in their dens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exibit homo ad opus suum,  et ad operationem suam usque ad vesperum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵצֵ֣א אָדָ֣ם לְפׇעֳל֑וֹ וְֽלַעֲבֹ֖דָת֣וֹ עֲדֵי־עָֽרֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Man shall go forth to his work, and to his labour until the evening.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin menee myös ihminen työhönsä, ja askareillensa ehtoosen asti.
verses.king_james: Man goeth forth unto his work and to his labour until the evening.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam magnificata sunt opera tua, Domine !  omnia in sapientia fecisti ;  impleta est terra possessione tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מָה־רַבּ֬וּ מַעֲשֶׂ֨יךָ ׀ יְֽהֹוָ֗ה כֻּ֭לָּם בְּחׇכְמָ֣ה עָשִׂ֑יתָ מָלְאָ֥ה הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ קִנְיָנֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: How great are thy works, O Lord ? thou hast made all things in wisdom: the earth is filled with thy riches.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, kuinka suuret ja monet ovat sinun käsialas? Sinä olet kaikki taitavasti säätänyt, ja maa on täynnä sinun tavaraas.
verses.king_james: O Lord, how manifold are thy works! in wisdom hast thou made them all: the earth is full of thy riches.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc mare magnum et spatiosum manibus ;  illic reptilia quorum non est numerus :  animalia pusilla cum magnis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֤ה ׀ הַיָּ֥ם גָּדוֹל֮ וּרְחַ֢ב יָ֫דָ֥יִם שָֽׁם־רֶ֭מֶשׂ וְאֵ֣ין מִסְפָּ֑ר חַיּ֥וֹת קְ֝טַנּ֗וֹת עִם־גְּדֹלֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: So is this great sea, which stretcheth wide its arms: there are creeping things without number: Creatures little and great.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä meri, joka niin suuri ja lavia on, siinä epälukuiset liikuvat, sekä pienet että suuret eläimet;
verses.king_james: So is this great and wide sea, wherein are things creeping innumerable, both small and great beasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illic naves pertransibunt ;  draco iste quem formasti ad illudendum ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֭ם אֳנִיּ֣וֹת יְהַלֵּכ֑וּן לִ֝וְיָתָ֗ן זֶֽה־יָצַ֥רְתָּ לְשַֽׂחֶק־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: There the ships shall go. This sea dragon which thou hast formed to play therein.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä haahdet kuljeskelevat: siinä valaskalat ovat, jotkas tehnyt olet, leikitsemään hänessä.
verses.king_james: There go the ships: there is that leviathan, whom thou hast made to play therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia a te expectant  ut des illis escam in tempore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֻּ֭לָּם אֵלֶ֣יךָ יְשַׂבֵּר֑וּן לָתֵ֖ת אׇכְלָ֣ם בְּעִתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: All expect of thee that thou give them food in season.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki odottavat sinua, ettäs heille antaisit ruan ajallansa.
verses.king_james: These wait all upon thee; that thou mayest give them their meat in due season.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dante te illis, colligent ;  aperiente te manum tuam, omnia implebuntur bonitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תִּתֵּ֣ן לָ֭הֶם יִלְקֹט֑וּן תִּפְתַּ֥ח יָ֝דְךָ֗ יִשְׂבְּע֥וּן טֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: What thou givest to them they shall gather up: when thou openest thy hand, they shall all be filled with good.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koskas heille annat, niin he kokoovat: koskas kätes avaat, niin he hyvyydellä ravitaan.
verses.king_james: That thou givest them they gather: thou openest thine hand, they are filled with good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Avertente autem te faciem, turbabuntur ;  auferes spiritum eorum, et deficient,  et in pulverem suum revertentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּסְתִּ֥יר פָּנֶיךָ֮ יִֽבָּהֵ֫ל֥וּן תֹּסֵ֣ף ר֭וּחָם יִגְוָע֑וּן וְֽאֶל־עֲפָרָ֥ם יְשׁוּבֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if thou turnest away thy face, they shall be troubled: thou shalt take away their breath, and they shall fail, and shall return to their dust.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos sinä kasvos peität, niin he hämmästyvät: koska sinä otat heidän henkensä pois, niin he hukkuvat, ja tomuksi tulevat jälleen.
verses.king_james: Thou hidest thy face, they are troubled: thou takest away their breath, they die, and return to their dust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Emittes spiritum tuum, et creabuntur,  et renovabis faciem terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּשַׁלַּ֣ח ר֭וּחֲךָ יִבָּרֵא֑וּן וּ֝תְחַדֵּ֗שׁ פְּנֵ֣י אֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt send forth thy spirit, and they shall be created: and thou shalt renew the face of the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä lähetät ulos henkes, niin he luoduksi tulevat, ja sinä uudistat maan muodon.
verses.king_james: Thou sendest forth thy spirit, they are created: and thou renewest the face of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sit gloria Domini in sæculum ;  lætabitur Dominus in operibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִ֤י כְב֣וֹד יְהֹוָ֣ה לְעוֹלָ֑ם יִשְׂמַ֖ח יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּמַעֲשָֽׂיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: May the glory of the Lord endure for ever: the Lord shall rejoice in his works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran kunnia pysyy ijankaikkisesti: Herra iloitsee töissänsä.
verses.king_james: The glory of the Lord shall endure for ever: the Lord shall rejoice in his works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui respicit terram, et facit eam tremere ;  qui tangit montes, et fumigant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמַּבִּ֣יט לָ֭אָרֶץ וַתִּרְעָ֑ד יִגַּ֖ע בֶּהָרִ֣ים וְֽיֶעֱשָֽׁנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He looketh upon the earth, and maketh it tremble: he troubleth the mountains, and they smoke.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän katsahtaa maan päälle, niin se vapisee: hän rupee vuoriin, niin ne suitsevat.
verses.king_james: He looketh on the earth, and it trembleth: he toucheth the hills, and they smoke.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantabo Domino in vita mea ;  psallam Deo meo quamdiu sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָשִׁ֣ירָה לַיהֹוָ֣ה בְּחַיָּ֑י אֲזַמְּרָ֖ה לֵאלֹהַ֣י בְּעוֹדִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will sing to the Lord as long as I live: I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä veisaan Herralle minun elinaikanani, ja kiitän minun Jumalaani niinkauvan kuin minä olen.
verses.king_james: I will sing unto the Lord as long as I live: I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jucundum sit ei eloquium meum ;  ego vero delectabor in Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶעֱרַ֣ב עָלָ֣יו שִׂיחִ֑י אָ֝נֹכִ֗י אֶשְׂמַ֥ח בַּיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let my speech be acceptable to him: but I will take delight in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun puheeni kelpaa hänelle, ja minä iloitsen Herrassa.
verses.king_james: My meditation of him shall be sweet: I will be glad in the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deficiant peccatores a terra,  et iniqui, ita ut non sint.  Benedic, anima mea, Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִתַּ֤מּוּ חַטָּאִ֨ים ׀ מִן־הָאָ֡רֶץ וּרְשָׁעִ֤ים ׀ ע֤וֹד אֵינָ֗ם בָּרְכִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי אֶת־יְהֹוָ֗ה הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let sinners be consumed out of the earth, and the unjust, so that they be no more: O my soul, bless thou the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Syntiset maalta lopetetaan, ja jumalattomat ei pidä silleen oleman: kiitä Herraa, sieluni, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: Let the sinners be consumed out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless thou the Lord, O my soul. Praise ye the Lord.
